creator: moiseev@mezonplus.ru
text:
(In reply to Yasuhiro KIMURA from comment #0)

We are trying to keep mail/rspamd and mail/rspamd-devel closely synced as possible.
We would appreciate it if you could maintain pkg-plist entries in alphabetical order. Would you in particular move "@sample %%ETCDIR%%/settings.conf.sample" up?
